## Problem

What problem are you trying to solve?

## Proposed Solution

Describe your ideal solution.

## User Value

How does this help creators/builders get measurable growth outcomes?

## Scope

- [ ] Small additive improvement
- [ ] Medium feature
- [ ] Large change (may require design discussion)

## Alternatives Considered

What alternatives did you evaluate?

## Extra Context

Links, screenshots, examples, or related issues.
